rationale: The cited paper is referenced only in the empirical data-description section to note a prior debate about randomizing versus grouping scale items and possible reliability effects. The citing study does not use the cited paper's subscale-distance metric, experimental setup, or results to develop its IRT model, hypotheses, or main analyses. Its core methodological contributions are grounded in other IRT and testlet sources, with this citation serving as contextual survey-design background.
